steps.prompt: Farmers grow food and look after animals so we can eat. They start work very early! First, the animals need feeding.
Half past five in the morning! It is nearly dark and the farmer is already up. The animals are hungry and cannot wait! Press Feed the animals!
After feeding the animals, the farmer goes out to work in the fields.
Eight o'clock — the sun is up! The farmer is planting, digging, and watering. There is so much to do. Press Work the fields!
At midday, the farmer stops to rest and eat.
Twelve o'clock — time for a rest. Farming is hard work and the farmer needs energy for the afternoon! Press Rest at midday!
Then, as the sun goes down, it is time to bring the animals safely inside.

steps.feedback: Five o'clock — the animals are safe inside for the night. Feed the animals, work the fields, rest at midday, then home. That is the farmer's day!
